scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-commit && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-python-developer && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-code-review
scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-commit && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-python-developer && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-code-review
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-commit && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-python-developer && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-code-review
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
